description: Super unique monster definitions — named boss monsters with specific classes, modifiers, treasure classes, and spawn behavior. Record size 0x34 (52 bytes). Max 512 entries. Builds hcIdx lookup table (max 66 slots) after load.

Superunique.description: Internal identifier key for this super unique (linked to search structure)

Name.description: String table key for the displayed boss name

Class.description: Monster class — resolved to monstats.txt row index at load time

hcIdx.description: Hardcoded index (0-65) mapping this super unique to engine spawn points. Used to build fast lookup table after load; engine aborts if any index 0-65 is unmapped

MonSound.description: Monster sound profile — resolved to monsounds.txt row index at load time

MinGrp.description: Minimum minion group size spawned with this boss

MaxGrp.description: Maximum minion group size spawned with this boss

AutoPos.description: Automatically position this boss at a preset location (1 = yes)

EClass.description: Encounter class — controls champion/unique spawn behavior for this boss

Stacks.description: Whether monster modifiers can stack on this boss (1 = yes)

Replaceable.description: Whether this boss can be replaced by another super unique (1 = yes)

Utrans.description: Transform color index for Normal difficulty (palette shift)

Utrans(N).description: Transform color index for Nightmare difficulty (palette shift)

Utrans(H).description: Transform color index for Hell difficulty (palette shift)

TC.description: Treasure class for Normal difficulty drops

TC(N).description: Treasure class for Nightmare difficulty drops

TC(H).description: Treasure class for Hell difficulty drops
